SuperPromptProjector contains routing-aware query construction, but the controller does not rebuild effective_retrieval_query_text after ActiveBrief relation classification writes the final routing state, so the handoff can retain the stale pre-classification query.

The projector contains ActiveBrief-aware query branches, but the complete preprocessing path does not invoke the routing-aware query builder after classifier extras become available; ActiveBrief contribution can therefore be missing from the stored effective query.
